name: ChatGPT
tagline: OpenAI's general-purpose conversational assistant.
description: Chat-based interface to OpenAI's GPT model family. Handles writing, brainstorming, coding help, summarization, image generation, and ad-hoc research. Paid plans add newer models, longer context, deep research, and the Operator agent.

name: Claude
tagline: Anthropic's assistant for long-form reasoning, writing, and coding.
description: Web and desktop assistant powered by the Claude model family. Strong at long-document analysis, careful writing, and coding via Artifacts and Projects. Pro and Max tiers add higher usage limits and access to the most capable models.

name: Gemini
tagline: Google's multimodal assistant integrated across Workspace.
description: Google's chat assistant built on the Gemini model family, with image, audio, video, and document understanding. Plugs into Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Meet for in-context help. Advanced tier unlocks the largest models, Deep Research, and longer context.

name: Microsoft Copilot
tagline: Microsoft's AI assistant across Windows, Edge, and Microsoft 365.
description: Conversational AI woven into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams. Drafts documents, summarizes threads, builds slides from prompts, and answers questions over your tenant's data. Targeted at knowledge workers already inside the Microsoft 365 stack.

name: Perplexity
tagline: Answer engine that cites sources for every response.
description: Conversational search that grounds answers in live web results with inline citations. Useful for fact-finding, comparisons, and research where provenance matters. Pro adds access to frontier models, Spaces, and the Comet browser.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: AI pair programmer inside your editor and on GitHub.
description: Inline code completion, chat, and pull-request review for VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim, and GitHub.com. Trained for multi-language autocompletion and refactors, with a coding agent for delegated tasks. Standard for teams already on GitHub.

name: Cursor
tagline: AI-first code editor forked from VS Code.
description: Editor that puts model-aware chat, multi-file edits, and autonomous agent loops at the center of the dev workflow. Popular with engineers who want stronger code reasoning than autocomplete-only tools. Pro tier adds higher request limits and frontier model access.

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI features built into Notion docs, databases, and wikis.
description: Generates, summarizes, translates, and answers questions over your Notion workspace. Q&A retrieves across pages and databases; AI fields automate work in tables. Bundled with Notion Business plans or sold as an add-on.

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity.
description: Browser, desktop, and mobile assistant that checks grammar, suggests rewrites, and adapts tone for the audience. Generative features draft and revise email, docs, and posts. Used widely by students, marketers, and enterprise comms teams.

name: Jasper
tagline: AI content platform for marketing teams.
description: Generates blog posts, ads, emails, and brand-voice-aligned campaigns. Includes brand voice memory, knowledge bases, and a campaign workflow. Aimed at in-house marketing and agency teams.

name: Copy.ai
tagline: GTM AI platform for sales and marketing workflows.
description: Builds workflows that combine AI generation with CRM and data tools to automate outbound, content, and enrichment. Marketed to revenue teams replacing manual prompt-by-prompt work. Workflow library and prebuilt agents are central to the product.

name: Writesonic
tagline: AI writing and SEO platform with chat and image tools.
description: Long-form articles, ads, and product descriptions with built-in SEO research and Chatsonic chatbot. Targets bloggers, agencies, and SMB marketing teams. Includes an AI image generator and a chatbot builder.

name: QuillBot
tagline: Paraphrasing, grammar, and summarization tool.
description: Rewrites and rephrases text with control over tone and length, plus grammar checking, summarization, and citation tools. Popular with students and ESL writers. Premium unlocks longer inputs and more modes.

name: Wordtune
tagline: AI rewriting assistant for clearer everyday writing.
description: Suggests alternate phrasings, shortens, expands, and adjusts tone inside the browser. Targets professionals and students writing email, docs, and reports. Premium adds higher quotas and AI generation features.

name: Sudowrite
tagline: AI writing partner built for fiction authors.
description: Drafting, brainstorming, and revision tools tuned for novels and short stories, with features like Story Bible and rewrite. Used by indie authors and screenwriters. Subscription-based with usage credits.

name: Midjourney
tagline: AI image generator known for stylized, cinematic output.
description: Text-to-image generation accessed through Discord and a web app, with strong defaults for illustration and photorealism. Used by designers, concept artists, and marketers for ideation and finished assets. Subscription required.

name: DALL·E 3
tagline: OpenAI's image generation model inside ChatGPT.
description: Text-to-image model integrated into ChatGPT and the OpenAI API. Strong at following detailed prompts and rendering text in images. Used inside ChatGPT for ad-hoc visuals and via API for app integrations.
pricing_summary: Included in ChatGPT Plus + API usage

name: Stable Diffusion
tagline: Open-weights image generation model family by Stability AI.
description: Family of open image models (SD 1.5, SDXL, SD3, Stable Diffusion 3.5) that anyone can run locally or fine-tune. Foundation for a large ecosystem of UIs, LoRAs, and ControlNets. Free to use; commercial license required at scale.

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: Adobe's commercially safe generative image and video models.
description: Generates images, vectors, and short video clips trained on licensed and Adobe Stock content. Integrates with Photoshop, Illustrator, and Express via Generative Fill and similar features. Sold standalone and bundled with Creative Cloud.

name: Canva Magic Studio
tagline: AI design suite inside Canva.
description: Bundle of Magic Write, Magic Design, Magic Edit, and video tools layered onto Canva's drag-and-drop editor. Aimed at non-designers building social posts, decks, and short videos. Included with Canva Pro and Teams.

name: Figma
tagline: Collaborative design tool with built-in AI features.
description: Browser-based UI and product design platform used by most modern product teams. AI features generate layouts, rename layers, and turn prompts into starter designs. Free for individuals; team plans for collaboration.

name: Runway
tagline: Generative video studio used by filmmakers and ad teams.
description: Text-to-video and video-to-video generation (Gen-3, Gen-4) plus a timeline editor with AI rotoscoping, inpainting, and lip-sync. Used in commercial film, music videos, and brand content. Credit-based pricing across tiers.

name: Pika
tagline: Generative video tool focused on short, stylized clips.
description: Web app for generating and editing short videos from text or image prompts, with effects like Pikaffects and lip sync. Popular for social-format content and creator experiments. Subscription tiers gate resolution and credits.

name: Synthesia
tagline: AI video platform with realistic presenter avatars.
description: Generates training, marketing, and internal-comms videos from a script using stock or custom avatars in 140+ languages. Used by enterprise L&D and HR teams to scale video without studios. Per-seat pricing.

name: HeyGen
tagline: Avatar video generator with translation and lip sync.
description: Creates avatar-led videos and translates existing videos into other languages with matched lip movement. Used for marketing, sales outreach, and localization. Self-serve plus enterprise plans.

name: D-ID
tagline: AI-powered talking-head video and avatar agents.
description: Turns photos and text into talking videos and creates conversational AI avatars for support and marketing. Used for product demos, training, and customer experience. Subscription with usage minutes.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Realistic AI voice generation, cloning, and dubbing.
description: Text-to-speech, voice cloning, and dubbing across 30+ languages with strong emotional control. Used by audiobook publishers, game studios, podcasters, and developers via API. Tiered subscriptions with character quotas.

name: Suno
tagline: Generative AI music creation from text prompts.
description: Generates full songs with vocals, instrumentation, and lyrics from short text prompts. Used by amateurs, content creators, and producers for sketches and finished tracks. Subscriptions gate commercial use and credits.

name: Descript
tagline: Edit audio and video by editing the transcript.
description: All-in-one editor for podcasts, screen recordings, and short-form video with AI transcription, voice cloning (Overdub), and filler-word removal. Used by podcasters, marketers, and creator teams. Per-seat plans.

name: Otter.ai
tagline: Real-time meeting transcription and AI summaries.
description: Joins Zoom, Meet, and Teams calls to transcribe live, generate notes, and assign action items. Strong on multi-speaker accuracy and search across past meetings. Free tier with paid plans for higher minutes.

name: Fireflies.ai
tagline: AI notetaker that records, transcribes, and analyzes meetings.
description: Bot that joins meetings across platforms, generates summaries and action items, and surfaces insights across teams. Includes conversation analytics and CRM sync. Per-seat pricing with a free tier.

name: Fathom
tagline: Free AI meeting recorder and notetaker.
description: Records and summarizes Zoom, Meet, and Teams calls into structured notes synced to your CRM. Popular with sales and customer-success teams for its generous free tier. Paid plans add team analytics.

name: Gong
tagline: Revenue intelligence platform that analyzes sales calls.
description: Records sales calls and emails, then surfaces deal risks, talk-time, and coaching opportunities. Used by enterprise sales orgs to standardize methodology and forecast more reliably. Enterprise pricing only.

name: Read AI
tagline: AI assistant that summarizes meetings, email, and chats.
description: Generates meeting summaries, sentiment scores, and action items, and now extends to email and messaging summaries. Targets execs and managers drowning in async comms. Free tier plus paid plans.

name: tl;dv
tagline: AI meeting recorder for Zoom, Meet, and Teams.
description: Records and transcribes meetings, then auto-generates timestamped notes and AI summaries. Strong CRM playbooks for sales discovery and product research. Free tier and paid team plans.

name: Krisp
tagline: AI noise cancellation and meeting notes for any call app.
description: Removes background noise, echoes, and voices on calls regardless of meeting platform, plus AI meeting transcription and summaries. Used by remote workers and contact centers. Free for individuals; team plans for orgs.

name: Notta
tagline: Multilingual meeting transcription and AI notes.
description: Records and transcribes meetings, voice memos, and uploads in 50+ languages with summaries and translation. Popular in APAC for cross-language calls. Tiered subscriptions by minutes.

name: Avoma
tagline: AI meeting assistant and conversation intelligence.
description: Combines meeting recording, scheduling, and conversation analytics for sales and CS teams. Generates structured notes mapped to deal stages and integrates with major CRMs. Per-seat plans across tiers.

name: Apollo.io
tagline: Sales intelligence and outreach platform with AI features.
description: B2B contact database combined with email sequencing, dialer, and AI assist for prospecting and outreach. Used by SDR teams to source and engage accounts. Free tier with paid plans by feature depth.

name: Outreach
tagline: Sales execution platform for sequenced outbound.
description: Cadence-based email and call platform with AI for sentiment, deal health, and rep coaching. Used by mid-market and enterprise sales orgs. Quote-based pricing.

name: Salesloft
tagline: Revenue orchestration platform with AI-driven Rhythm.
description: Sequences, dialer, and conversation intelligence with AI prioritization of next-best actions for reps. Common alternative to Outreach. Quote-based pricing.

name: HubSpot
tagline: CRM with Breeze AI across marketing, sales, and service.
description: All-in-one CRM and marketing suite with Breeze, an AI layer for content, prospecting, and customer agents. Used by SMB and mid-market revenue teams. Tiered pricing by hub and edition.

name: Surfer SEO
tagline: Content optimization tool grounded in SERP data.
description: Analyzes top-ranking pages and scores drafts on terms, structure, and length for target keywords. AI-assisted outlines and drafts speed up briefs. Used by SEO and content teams.

name: Frase
tagline: SERP-based AI content brief and writing tool.
description: Generates briefs, outlines, and drafts informed by competitive analysis of search results. Used by SEO writers and agencies. Subscription tiers based on documents and seats.

name: Anyword
tagline: AI copywriting platform with predictive performance scores.
description: Generates ad copy, landing pages, and emails with predictive scoring tuned to brand voice and audience. Used by performance marketing teams. Tiered seats with per-account customization.

name: Lavender
tagline: AI email coach for sales reps.
description: Inbox sidekick that scores cold emails, suggests rewrites, and pulls context about the recipient. Used by SDRs and AEs to improve reply rates. Per-seat pricing.

name: Lemlist
tagline: Cold outreach tool with AI personalization.
description: Multichannel outbound (email, LinkedIn, calls) with AI-generated personalization at the line and image level. Popular with founders, agencies, and SMB SDR teams. Tiered seats.

name: Clay
tagline: GTM data enrichment and automation platform.
description: Spreadsheet-style canvas that enriches contacts and accounts from 100+ sources and uses AI to write personalized outbound. Used by GTM ops and growth teams. Credit-based tiers.

name: Tableau
tagline: BI platform with Tableau Pulse and Einstein AI.
description: Industry-standard data visualization with AI summaries, automated insights, and conversational analytics through Tableau Pulse and Einstein. Used by analytics teams across the enterprise. Per-user subscriptions.

name: ThoughtSpot
tagline: Search-driven analytics with the Spotter AI agent.
description: Lets business users ask natural-language questions of their data warehouse and get visualizations and insights. Spotter handles follow-up questions and explanations. Sold to mid-market and enterprise data teams.

name: Hex
tagline: Collaborative data workspace with Magic AI.
description: Notebook-style environment for SQL, Python, and apps over warehouse data, with Magic AI for queries, charts, and explanations. Popular with data and analytics engineering teams. Per-seat plans.

name: Mode
tagline: Collaborative analytics platform now part of ThoughtSpot.
description: SQL- and Python-driven analytics workspace used by data teams to build dashboards and reports. AI assist drafts queries and explanations. Sold via Studio and Business plans.

name: Sigma
tagline: Spreadsheet-style BI for cloud data warehouses.
description: Lets analysts and operators explore warehouse data using a familiar spreadsheet UI plus AI assist. Often replaces Looker for teams that want spreadsheet ergonomics on top of Snowflake or BigQuery. Per-user pricing.

name: Julius AI
tagline: AI data analyst for spreadsheets and CSVs.
description: Chat with your data: upload files or connect databases and ask questions to get charts, models, and code. Used by analysts, founders, and researchers who want quick exploratory analysis. Free tier with paid plans.

name: Khanmigo
tagline: Khan Academy's AI tutor and teacher assistant.
description: Socratic tutor for students and lesson-planning helper for teachers, built on top of Khan Academy's curriculum. Free for US teachers; affordable for parents and learners. Schools and districts can deploy at scale.

name: Duolingo Max
tagline: Premium Duolingo tier with AI-powered features.
description: Adds Roleplay conversations, Explain My Answer, and Video Call practice on top of Duolingo Super. Targets learners who want more open-ended speaking and feedback. Subscription tier above Super.

name: Quizlet
tagline: Study platform with AI Q-Chat tutor and Magic Notes.
description: Flashcard and study app augmented by an AI tutor that quizzes Socratically and a notes feature that turns documents into study sets. Used widely by high-school and college students. Free with Plus subscription.

name: Speak
tagline: AI tutor for spoken language practice.
description: Conversational language-learning app focused on speaking, with an AI tutor that gives feedback in real time. Strong in Korean and Japanese markets. Subscription-based.

name: Coursera Coach
tagline: AI coach embedded in Coursera courses.
description: In-course assistant that answers questions, summarizes lectures, and quizzes learners on Coursera content. Available across Coursera Plus and many Coursera for Business deployments. Included with subscription.

name: Brisk Teaching
tagline: Chrome extension that adds AI tools to teacher workflows.
description: Adds AI feedback, leveling, rubric grading, and quiz generation directly to Google Docs, Slides, and Classroom. Used by K-12 teachers to save planning and grading time. Free tier with paid Premium.

name: MagicSchool
tagline: AI platform built for teachers.
description: Library of teacher-focused AI tools for lesson planning, IEPs, communications, and grading. Includes a student-safe assistant. Free tier; paid plans for schools and districts.

name: Tabnine
tagline: Privacy-focused AI code completion.
description: AI coding assistant with on-prem and air-gapped options for regulated industries. Supports most major IDEs and offers chat plus completions tuned on a team's repos. Per-seat pricing.

name: Codeium
tagline: Free AI autocomplete and chat for developers.
description: Free individual code completion plus chat across 70+ languages and most IDEs. Codeium also produces the Windsurf editor for agentic coding. Enterprise plans add deployment options.

name: Replit
tagline: Browser IDE with the Replit Agent for full-stack apps.
description: Cloud development environment that lets users prompt the Replit Agent to scaffold and deploy full-stack apps end-to-end. Targets indie hackers, students, and prototypers. Subscription tiers gate compute and Agent usage.

name: Sourcegraph Cody
tagline: AI coding assistant grounded in your whole codebase.
description: Editor and web assistant that uses Sourcegraph's code graph for whole-repo context, refactors, and Q&A. Targets enterprise codebases too large for editor-only context. Per-seat pricing.

name: JetBrains AI Assistant
tagline: AI coding assistant inside the JetBrains IDE family.
description: Chat, completion, and refactoring tools integrated into IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm, and other JetBrains IDEs. Now bundled with the Junie autonomous coding agent. Per-seat add-on or included in All Products Pack.

name: Aider
tagline: Open-source AI pair programmer in your terminal.
description: CLI tool that pairs with a model (Claude, GPT, local) to edit your local Git repo with diff-based commits. Popular with engineers who want a scriptable agent outside an IDE. Free and open source.
pricing_summary: Free open source + bring-your-own API key

name: Phind
tagline: AI search engine for developers.
description: Answer engine tuned for technical questions, returning step-by-step explanations grounded in docs and StackOverflow-style sources. Used by engineers as a faster alternative to web search. Free tier plus Pro.

name: You.com
tagline: Multi-model AI search and assistant platform.
description: Search engine and chat that can route between multiple LLMs, run agents, and produce structured research reports. Pro tier exposes more models and higher limits. ARI agent targets enterprise research.

name: Consensus
tagline: AI search engine for peer-reviewed research.
description: Searches scientific papers and answers questions with study-backed claims and quality indicators. Used by researchers, clinicians, and students. Free tier with paid Pro.

name: Elicit
tagline: AI research assistant for systematic literature review.
description: Finds papers, extracts data into tables, and synthesizes findings across studies. Used by academics, policy analysts, and biotech researchers. Tiered subscriptions for individuals and teams.

name: Scite
tagline: Smart citations and AI assistant for academic literature.
description: Shows how papers have been cited (supporting, contrasting, mentioning) and offers an AI assistant grounded in 1.2B+ citation statements. Used by researchers and librarians. Subscription pricing.

name: Glasp
tagline: Social web highlighter with AI summaries.
description: Highlight and save articles, YouTube transcripts, and PDFs, then synthesize across them with AI. Popular with knowledge workers building personal research libraries. Free with paid AI features.

name: Kagi
tagline: Premium ad-free search with AI assistant.
description: Paid search engine that ranks by quality and integrates an AI Assistant with multiple frontier models. Targets users frustrated with ad-driven search. Subscription required.

name: Exa
tagline: Neural search API for developers building with LLMs.
description: Search API designed to surface high-quality, semantically relevant web content for LLM apps and agents. Used by AI developers as a web retrieval layer. Usage-based pricing.

name: Zapier
tagline: Workflow automation with AI agents and Copilot.
description: Connects 7,000+ apps with no-code automations and AI features for building agents and assistants. Used by ops, marketing, and revenue teams to glue SaaS together. Tiered task-based pricing.

name: Make
tagline: Visual workflow automation platform.
description: Drag-and-drop scenario builder for automations across 1,500+ apps, with AI assist and operations-based pricing. Often picked over Zapier for complex multi-branch workflows. Tiered plans.

name: n8n
tagline: Open-source, fair-code workflow automation.
description: Self-hostable workflow builder with native AI nodes, code steps, and 400+ integrations. Popular with technical teams who want control or on-prem deployment. Free self-hosted; paid cloud and enterprise.

name: Bardeen
tagline: AI browser automation for repetitive web tasks.
description: Chrome extension that automates scraping, data entry, and CRM workflows directly in the browser. Magic Box generates new automations from a prompt. Free tier plus paid plans.

name: LangChain
tagline: Framework for building LLM apps and agents.
description: Python and JavaScript framework for chaining LLM calls, tools, and retrieval. Widely used in production AI apps and prototypes. Free open source; LangSmith and LangGraph Platform sold separately.

name: CrewAI
tagline: Framework for orchestrating multi-agent teams.
description: Open-source framework for defining multiple AI agents with roles that collaborate on tasks. Used by developers building agentic workflows beyond single-prompt apps. Free open source plus paid Enterprise.

name: AutoGPT
tagline: Open-source platform for autonomous AI agents.
description: Self-hostable platform for creating and running goal-directed agents with tools and memory. Catalyzed the agent movement in 2023; still active as a managed and open-source offering. Free open source.

name: Pinecone
tagline: Managed vector database for AI applications.
description: Hosted vector store for RAG, recommendations, and semantic search. Used heavily in production LLM apps for low-latency retrieval. Serverless and dedicated tiers.

name: Weaviate
tagline: Open-source vector database for AI workloads.
description: Vector database with hybrid search, multi-tenancy, and built-in modules for popular embedding models. Used by teams that want open-source flexibility or self-hosting. Free OSS plus managed Cloud.

name: ClickUp
tagline: All-in-one work platform with ClickUp Brain AI.
description: Project management, docs, and chat in one workspace, with Brain AI for summaries, content, and Q&A across the workspace. Used by SMB and mid-market teams. Tiered per-seat pricing.

name: Asana
tagline: Project and work management with Asana AI.
description: Workflow and project tracking platform with AI for status updates, smart goals, and resource recommendations. Used by mid-market and enterprise PMOs and ops teams. Tiered per-seat pricing.

name: Motion
tagline: AI calendar and task manager that auto-schedules your day.
description: Combines tasks, calendar, and meetings, then uses AI to plan your week around priorities and constraints. Used by founders and busy ICs who want fewer planning decisions. Subscription per user.

name: Reclaim.ai
tagline: AI scheduling assistant for habits, tasks, and meetings.
description: Automatically blocks time for habits, tasks, and 1:1s on Google Calendar based on priorities. Targets professionals using calendar as a planning tool. Free tier with paid plans.

name: Mem
tagline: AI-native notes app with memory across your knowledge.
description: Note-taking app that automatically organizes, links, and surfaces past notes through AI. Targets knowledge workers who want a personal knowledge base without manual tagging. Subscription required for full AI.

name: Reflect
tagline: Networked notes app with built-in AI.
description: Personal note-taking with backlinks and a GPT-powered assistant for writing and research. Popular with consultants, researchers, and writers. Subscription with desktop, web, and mobile apps.

name: Tana
tagline: Outliner and knowledge OS with AI super-tags.
description: Powerful outliner and database hybrid with AI commands that turn notes into structured data. Popular with power users and knowledge workers building custom systems. Subscription per user.

name: Gamma
tagline: AI presentations, websites, and docs from prompts.
description: Generates editable decks, one-page sites, and documents from a short prompt or outline. Used by founders, marketers, and educators for fast visual content. Credit-based free tier plus paid plans.

name: Tome
tagline: AI workspace for sales account research and outreach.
description: Originally an AI presentation tool, Tome is now focused on AI-powered sales account research. Targets enterprise sales teams researching strategic accounts. Per-seat pricing.

name: Coda
tagline: All-in-one doc with AI building blocks.
description: Docs that combine spreadsheets, databases, and apps with Coda AI for content, summaries, and column-level automations. Used by ops and product teams. Per-Doc-Maker pricing.

name: Le Chat
tagline: Mistral AI's multilingual chat assistant.
description: Web and mobile chat assistant powered by Mistral's open and frontier models, with web browsing, code execution, and image features. Strong multilingual performance, especially in French and European languages. Free tier with paid Pro.

name: Grok
tagline: xAI's chat assistant integrated with X.
description: Conversational assistant from xAI with image generation, real-time data from X, and tool use. Available on x.com, mobile, and via API. Tied to X Premium subscriptions.

name: Character.AI
tagline: Platform for chatting with user-created AI characters.
description: Web and mobile app where users create and converse with persona-driven AI characters for entertainment, role-play, and learning. Massive consumer audience among teens and young adults. Free tier plus c.ai+ subscription.

name: Poe
tagline: Quora's multi-model AI chat platform.
description: Single interface to chat with dozens of models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, image and video models) with shared subscription credits. Useful for users who want to compare models or build bots. Free tier plus paid plans.

name: Pi
tagline: Inflection AI's conversational personal assistant.
description: Voice-and-text companion designed for empathetic, supportive conversation rather than agentic tasks. Free across web and mobile. Targets consumers seeking a calmer, more personal AI.

name: Leonardo.Ai
tagline: Image and video generation studio for creators.
description: Web app for image generation, fine-tuned style models, and short video generation. Popular with game artists, marketers, and indie creators. Tiered token-based plans.

name: Ideogram
tagline: AI image generator strong at typography and posters.
description: Text-to-image model known for accurately rendering text within images, plus a magic-prompt assistant. Used for posters, logos, and stylized graphics. Free tier with paid plans.

name: Recraft
tagline: AI image tool focused on vectors, brand sets, and design.
description: Generative tool that produces vector graphics, brand-consistent images, and editable design assets. Used by designers and marketing teams. Free credits with paid tiers.

name: Krea
tagline: Real-time AI image and video generator.
description: Realtime canvas where prompts and sketches turn into images and short videos using a mix of open and proprietary models. Popular with creative pros for fast iteration. Free tier plus subscriptions.

name: Magnific
tagline: AI image upscaler and enhancer.
description: Upscales images with creative reimagination, enhancing or transforming details. Used by photographers, designers, and 3D artists. Subscription-based with credits.

name: FLUX
tagline: Black Forest Labs' family of image generation models.
description: FLUX.1 (pro, dev, schnell) image models known for photorealism and prompt adherence. Available via API and integrated into many third-party tools. Usage-based and open weights for some variants.

name: Luma Dream Machine
tagline: Text- and image-to-video generation by Luma.
description: Video generation app and API that produces short cinematic clips from prompts and reference images. Used by creators and brands. Subscription tiers gate resolution and credits.

name: CapCut
tagline: All-in-one video editor with AI features.
description: Free video editor (desktop, mobile, web) with AI captions, background removal, voice cloning, and script-to-video. Used by social media creators globally. Free tier with Pro upgrade.

name: VEED.IO
tagline: Browser-based video editor with AI tools.
description: Online video editor with AI subtitles, translation, avatars, and audio cleanup. Targets marketers, podcasters, and educators. Free tier plus paid plans.

name: Captions
tagline: AI video creation app for talking-head content.
description: Mobile and web app with AI captions, lip sync, dubs, and Edit Magic for fast short-form video. Popular with creators producing TikTok and Reels. Subscription with free tier.

name: OpusClip
tagline: Turn long videos into short, viral-ready clips.
description: Uploads long-form video and generates short clips with captions, framing, and predicted virality scores. Used by creators and marketers repurposing podcasts and webinars. Tiered plans by minutes.

name: Pictory
tagline: AI tool for turning scripts and articles into videos.
description: Generates short videos from text scripts, blog posts, or recorded webinars with stock footage and voiceovers. Targets marketers and content teams. Subscription tiers by minutes.

name: InVideo AI
tagline: AI video generator from text prompts.
description: Generates editable videos from a one-line prompt with stock footage, AI voice, and music. Used by social marketers and SMB content teams. Free tier with paid plans.

name: Murf
tagline: AI voice studio for narration and voiceovers.
description: Text-to-speech with 200+ voices and 20+ languages, plus voice cloning and a video-narration studio. Used for e-learning, ads, and explainer videos. Subscription by hours.

name: PlayHT
tagline: Realistic text-to-speech and voice cloning platform.
description: Voice generation and cloning across 140+ languages with low-latency Play 3.0 mini for agents. Used for podcasts, IVR, and conversational AI. Subscription and API.

name: Resemble AI
tagline: Voice cloning and detection platform for enterprises.
description: Custom voice cloning, dubbing, and watermark detection for media and contact centers. Strong enterprise compliance posture. Quote-based pricing.

name: Beautiful.ai
tagline: AI presentation maker with smart slide templates.
description: Deck-building tool that auto-formats slides as you add content and includes AI generation from prompts. Used by sales, marketing, and execs producing branded decks. Per-user subscriptions.

name: Looka
tagline: AI logo and brand kit generator.
description: Generates logos, color palettes, and brand assets from a short questionnaire. Used by founders and SMBs without a designer. One-time and subscription pricing.

name: Uizard
tagline: AI UI design tool that converts sketches and prompts into mockups.
description: Drag-and-drop UI tool with AI features that turn screenshots, sketches, or prompts into editable mockups and prototypes. Used by PMs and non-designers. Subscription tiers.

name: Galileo AI
tagline: AI design tool that generates editable UI from prompts.
description: Generates high-fidelity UI designs from text prompts and exports to Figma. Aimed at product designers and PMs. Acquired by Google in 2024 and continues to operate.

name: Visme
tagline: Visual content creation platform with AI tools.
description: Creates infographics, presentations, and reports with templates, brand kits, and AI generation. Targets marketing and sales teams. Subscription per user.

name: Lex
tagline: AI-augmented word processor for serious writers.
description: Clean writing environment with AI commands for drafting, rewriting, and feedback, designed to feel like Google Docs with an editor. Used by journalists, founders, and authors. Free tier with Pro.

name: Hemingway Editor
tagline: Editor that scores writing for clarity and readability.
